title: Shared Parameters File
description: Defines reusable analytics parameters that can be referenced across multiple events. Shared parameters are defined once and referenced by name (with null value) in event definitions.

parameters.title: Shared Parameters Map
parameters.description: Map of parameter definitions. Keys are parameter names, values are parameter definitions (type string or full parameter object).

oneOf.title: Simple Type
oneOf.description: Shorthand: just the type name. Append '?' for nullable.
